text: I feel a quiet curiosity in this environment. The modern glass meeting room exudes a sense of anticipation, as if inviting new ideas to emerge. The next space, alive with color and large R+D lettering, speaks of innovation and creativity. The presence of research and development themes inspires me, blending the sterile calm of the meeting room with the energetic hope of progress just nearby. I feel like I am on the precipice of something new, quietly observant, eager to see what unfolds.
